title: Supabase connection error due to incorrect protocol
symptom: When attempting to connect to Supabase using the database connection string, n8n throws 'Couldn’t connect with these settings: Unsupported protocol postgresql:'.
not_this_if: Using the correct API URL for Supabase
root_cause: The Supabase node in n8n requires the API URL for connection, not the database connection string. Using the database connection string leads to an unsupported protocol error.
fix_steps: Paste the API URL into the Supabase node settings in n8n
Save the workflow and try connecting again
agent_instruction: Use the API URL from Supabase Project Settings instead of the database connection string.
